description: Slip-on sandals have never looked this good. These brown leather sandals from catwalk are versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans to shorts and skirts. The leather panels with the cutouts are perfect for everyday wear.UpperLeather bands with cutouts over the forefoot and on the midfootElastic band looped through the forefoot leather band and attached to an ankle strap for a snug FitAnkle strap for added comfortSoft leather lining for added comfortCushioned footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelGrooved floral pattern on the forefoot and heel for better gripSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shine
